response.original_title: Ten Yard Fight: The Only Way, A Video Documentary: 1995-1999
response.overview: The Only Way is a 61-minute video documentary about the band Ten Yard Fight, borrowing the name from their final EP and featuring outtakes on the road & footage from their final show on 10.17.99, where Sweet Pete of In My Eyes proclaimed 10/17 to be forever known as Edge Day.  Created by TYF members John Lacroix and Anthony "Wrench" Moreschi, the first pressing of this VHS tape originally came out on two different colored cassettes, mirroring the vinyl colors used for the vinyl of their first EP, the Hardcore Pride 7-inch on the Big Wheel Recreation label. A 2nd pressing was released on a black VHS cassette.
response.title: Ten Yard Fight: The Only Way, A Video Documentary: 1995-1999

results.name: Ten Yard Fight "The Only Way" Video Documentary
